{{Short description|2022 film festival in Berlin, Germany}} {{Use dmy dates|date=December 2021}} {{Use British English|date=March 2022}} {{Infobox Film festival | name = 72nd Berlin International Film Festival | image = 72nd Berlin International Film Festival.jpg | caption = Festival poster | opening = ''[[Peter von Kant]]'' by [[François Ozon]] | closing = ''[[Alcarràs (film)|Alcarràs]]'' by [[Carla Simón]] | location = [[Berlin]], Germany | founded = 1951 | awards = {{Plainlist| *[[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Alcarràs (film)|Alcarràs]]'' by [[Carla Simón]] *[[Honorary Golden Bear]]: [[Isabelle Huppert]]}} | host = | artistic_director = [[Carlo Chatrian]] | directors = Mariette Rissenbeek | number = 229 | date = Opening: {{Start date|2022|2|10|df=y}}
Closing: {{End date|2022|2|20|df=y}} | website = {{official URL}} | main = [[Berlin International Film Festival]] | previous = [[71st Berlin International Film Festival|71st]] | next = [[73rd Berlin International Film Festival|73rd]] }} The '''72nd annual Berlin International Film Festival''', usually called the '''Berlinale''' ({{IPA|de|bɛʁliˈnaːlə|-|De-Berlinale2.ogg}}), took place from 10 to 20 February 2022 in person.{{cite web|url=https://www.visitberlin.de/en/event/72nd-international-film-festival-berlin-berlinale |title=72nd International Film Festival Berlin - Berlinale |work=Visit Berlin |access-date=15 December 2021}}{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2021/film/global/berlin-film-festival-2022-edition-set-as-in-person-event-dates-revealed-1235083013/ |title=Berlin Film Festival 2022 Edition Set as In-Person Event, Dates Revealed |first=Naman|last= Ramachandran|date=7 October 2021 |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |access-date=15 December 2021}} On 15 December 2021, the first film of the festival was announced.{{Cite web|url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/berlin-film-festival-2022-first-titles-1235062472/ |title= Berlin Announces First Films for 2022 Including Titles With Isabelle Huppert and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau |author= Scott Roxborough |website= Hollywood Reporter |date= 15 December 2021 |access-date= 15 December 2021|lang=en}} The festival opened with [[François Ozon]]'s drama film ''[[Peter von Kant]]''.{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2022/film/global/francois-ozon-peter-von-kant-berlin-1235152222/ |title=Francois Ozon's 'Peter Von Kant' to Open Berlin Film Festival|first=Manori |last= Ravindran|date=12 January 2022 |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |access-date=13 January 2022}}{{Cite web|url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/2022-berlin-film-festival-opening-ceremony-1235091082/ |title= Berlin Festival Opens With "Return to Reality" as In-Person Event Kicks Off |author= Scott Roxborough |website= Hollywood Reporter |date= 10 February 2022 |access-date= 11 February 2022|lang=en}} [[Isabelle Huppert]] was awarded [[Honorary Golden Bear]] for lifetime achievement on 15 February 2022 at the Berlinale Palast award ceremony. Her new film by Laurent Larivière, ''[[About Joan]]'' was also screened.{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2021/film/global/berlin-golden-bear-isabelle-huppert-1235134853/ |title=Isabelle Huppert to Receive Berlin Film Festival's Honorary Golden Bear |first=Manori |last= Ravindran|date=16 December 2021 |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |access-date=16 December 2021}} The awards were presented on 16 February 2022 truncating the festival by 4 days. ''[[Alcarràs (film)|Alcarràs]]'' by [[Carla Simón]] won the [[Golden Bear]] award and ''[[The Novelist's Film]]'' by [[Hong Sang-soo]] won the [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]].{{Cite web|url=https://deadline.com/2022/02/berlin-film-festival-2022-award-winners-list-1234934923/ |title= Berlin Film Festival Awards: 'Alcarràs' Wins Golden Bear, Claire Denis Named Best Director |first= Tom |last= Grater|website= Deadline |date=16 February 2022 |access-date=17 February 2022|lang=en}}{{Cite web|url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/berlin-2022-film-festival-awards-golden-bear-winner-best-film-1235093958/ |title= Berlin: 'Alcarras' Wins Golden Bear for Best Film |author= Scott Roxborough |website= Hollywood Reporter |date= 16 February 2022 |access-date= 17 February 2022|lang=en}} The festival formally closed on 20 February 2022.{{Cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/film/2022/feb/19/berlin-film-festival-2022-roundup-earnestness-joy-and-the-best-film-won-alcarras-golden-bear |title= Berlin film festival 2022 roundup – earnestness, joy, and the best film won |author= Jonathan Romney |website= The Guardian|date= 19 February 2022 |access-date=21 February 2022|lang=en}} ==Jury== ===Main Competition=== [[File:M. Night Shyamalan by Gage Skidmore.jpg|thumb|right|M. Night Shyamalan, Jury President (competition)|266x266px]] The following were on the jury for the Berlinale Competition section:{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/news-topics/news/detail_126472.html |title=Berlinale 2022: International Jury |work=Berlinale |date=2 February 2022|access-date=26 January 2022}}{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2021/film/global/m-night-shyamalan-berlinale-jury-president-1235092408/ |title=M.
